response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with a strong background in distributed systems, web technologies, and software architecture, he falls significantly short of the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. His experience is primarily focused on full-stack web development, Node.js, and DLang, rather than the low-level cloud compute platform engineering and extensive C++ development required for this Technical Lead role.
strengths: Extensive experience designing and scaling distributed systems and microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated leadership and mentoring abilities through organizing workshops, courses, and establishing software craftsmanship practices.
Strong background in software architecture and taking ownership of complex, ambiguous projects from inception to production.
concerns: Lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with only about 7 months of professional C/C++ experience listed.
Experience is predominantly in full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript) rather than foundational cloud compute infrastructure and hardware architecture.
Limited evidence of leading technical strategy specifically for internal cloud compute platforms or deep DevOps/cloud infrastructure teams.
